examples.text: How do I reset my password?
I cannot log into my account
How do I upgrade my plan?
I want to change to a higher plan

password_reset: To reset your password, go to the sign-in page and select 'Forgot password'. Follow the email link to create a new password.
login_help: If you cannot sign in, first confirm your email and password are correct. If that fails, use the password reset flow and check whether your browser is blocking cookies.
support_hours: Support is available Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM local time.
billing_upgrade: You can upgrade from the Billing page in Account Settings. Choose the new plan and confirm the change.
cancel_subscription: You can cancel from Account Settings > Billing > Subscription. Your plan will remain active until the end of the current billing period.
greeting: Hi — how can I help you today?
__fallback__: I’m not fully confident about that yet. Could you rephrase it, or ask about login, billing, password resets, or support hours?
